name: Directivity-Only measuredAntenna for txsite
description: Tests creating a measuredAntenna with Directivity and E=[] for use with txsite
prompt: Convert a dipole antenna at 2.4 GHz into a measuredAntenna suitable for use with txsite. Use a single frequency (2.4 GHz) and 5-degree grid. Create a transmitter site with the measured antenna.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

name: E-Field Workflow with Pattern Verification
description: Tests full E-field extraction and measuredAntenna creation with pattern display
prompt: Create a measuredAntenna from a patch microstrip at 2.4 GHz using the full E-field workflow at a single frequency with a 5-degree grid. Display its radiation pattern to verify.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses EHfields to extract E-field data

name: Tilted measuredAntenna for Satellite Link
description: Tests creating a measuredAntenna with Tilt for satellite pointing
prompt: Create a measuredAntenna from a horn at 12 GHz and tilt it 45 degrees for satellite uplink. Use a single frequency and 5-degree grid. Report peak directivity.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Sets Tilt property on source antenna

name: EmbeddedE Beam Steering with Phase Shift
description: Tests creating a measuredAntenna with EmbeddedE for array beam steering
prompt: Create a measuredAntenna from a 4-element linear array at 2.4 GHz using the EmbeddedE workflow at a single frequency with a 5-degree grid. Apply phase shifts for beam steering to 30 degrees azimuth.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Applies phase shifts for beam steering
